Well-planned layout suitable for families, working professionals or rental investment.

Located within a resort-style township with access to clubhouse facilities, golf course, football and futsal courts, jogging and cycling tracks, parks and playgrounds. Ideal for active and family-oriented living.

Near KPJ Healthcare University College, schools, colleges, grocery stores and daily amenities. Strong rental demand from students and staff.

Investor Appeal
Competitive entry pricing compared to major cities. Growing township with consistent buyer and tenant interest. Suitable for long-term rental income and capital appreciation.
